# Algorand Bridges and Swap Tools

## XO Swap

XO Swap is a premium cross-chain crypto swap engine developed and powered by Exodus. It serves as a swap aggregator that enables fast, secure, and seamless cryptocurrency swaps across multiple blockchains, including Algorand. 50+ networks supported, often integrated directly into wallets for one-tap or in-app swapping without needing KYC in many cases.

- XO Swap Website: https://www.xoswap.com/
- XO Swap X Account: https://x.com/XO_Swap
- XO Swap API: https://www.xoswap.com/docs

## Simple Swap

SimpleSwap is an instant, non-custodial crypto swap service that lets users exchange cryptocurrencies quickly without requiring registration or creating an account. It supports a very large number of assets—over 2,500 cryptocurrencies (and fiat options in some cases), across numerous blockchains.

- Simple Swap Website: https://simpleswap.io/
- Simple Swap X Account: https://x.com/SimpleSwap_io
- Simple Swap API: https://simpleswap.io/en/affiliate-program/how-to-start/api

## Allbridge

Allbridge (specifically Allbridge Core) is a cross-chain bridging platform that enables seamless transfers of stablecoins (primarily native USDC) and other assets between multiple blockchains, including Algorand. It focuses on native asset bridging — meaning users get the real, native version of tokens (like native USDC on Algorand) rather than wrapped or synthetic versions — which reduces friction, avoids extra steps, and supports better liquidity and DeFi use cases.

- Allbridge Website: https://allbridge.io/
- Allbridge Core API: https://docs-core.allbridge.io/sdk/allbridge-core-rest-api

## Wormhole Native Token Transfers (NTT)

Native Token Transfer (NTT) is Wormhole's framework for transferring tokens across blockchains without requiring liquidity pools. Unlike traditional token bridges that wrap assets or rely on locked liquidity, NTT enables direct token transfers by either burning tokens on the source chain and minting them on the destination, or by locking tokens on one chain while minting representations on others.

- Wormhole NTT Developer Guide: https://dev.algorand.co/resources/bridging/
